items.title: Human Heart Diagram
items.subject: Integrated Science
items.description: Detailed labeled diagram of the human heart showing chambers, valves, and major blood vessels.

items.title: Digestive System Diagram
items.subject: Integrated Science
items.description: Complete diagram of the human digestive system from mouth to large intestine with labels.

items.title: Plant Cell Structure
items.subject: Integrated Science
items.description: Labeled diagram of a plant cell showing cell wall, chloroplasts, nucleus, vacuole, and other organelles.

items.title: Mount Kenya
items.subject: Social Studies
items.description: Photograph of Mount Kenya, the highest mountain in Kenya and second-highest in Africa at 5,199 metres.

items.title: Physical Map of Kenya
items.subject: Social Studies
items.description: Physical map showing Kenya's mountains, rivers, lakes, Rift Valley, and coastal features.

items.title: Parts of a Computer
items.subject: Computer Studies
items.description: Labeled diagram of a desktop computer showing monitor, CPU, keyboard, mouse, and internal components.

items.title: Electric Circuit Diagram
items.subject: Integrated Science
items.description: Diagram showing a simple electric circuit with battery, switch, bulb, and connecting wires.

items.title: Color Wheel
items.subject: Creative Arts
items.description: Color wheel showing primary, secondary, and tertiary colors with warm and cool color sections.

items.title: Soil Profile Layers
items.subject: Agriculture
items.description: Cross-section diagram of soil profile showing topsoil, subsoil, parent rock, and bedrock layers.

items.title: Water Cycle Diagram
items.subject: Integrated Science
items.description: Diagram illustrating the water cycle: evaporation, condensation, precipitation, collection, and transpiration.
